title: Fifty Store
summary: A modern storefront project built with TypeScript, focused on product browsing and a clean shopping experience.
description: Fifty Store is an e-commerce front-end project that highlights product cards, shopping flows and responsive layouts for desktop and mobile users.
challenges: Keeping the shopping interface clean while still showing useful product details, actions and layout states across screen sizes.
solution: Built reusable UI sections and kept the design focused on clear product browsing, simple navigation and responsive spacing.
architecture: TypeScript front end with component-based pages, reusable product UI and styling built for responsive storefront layouts.

title: Smart Health
summary: A Flutter mobile app practice project focused on clean screens, navigation and mobile UI fundamentals.
description: Smart Health is a small Flutter learning project that explores app screens, widget composition and navigation patterns for a health-focused Android experience.
challenges: Building a polished mobile experience while keeping the app simple and easy to follow during early Flutter practice.
solution: Used reusable Flutter widgets, clear screen flow and a layout approach centered on readability, spacing and touch-friendly interactions.
architecture: Flutter application built in Dart with focused screens, simple navigation and a mobile-first UI structure.

title: Dari TN App
summary: A Flutter mobile app project for real-estate style browsing and app UI practice.
description: Dari TN App is a Dart/Flutter project used to practice mobile screens, navigation and clean app layouts for a Tunisian real-estate idea.
challenges: Designing a mobile experience that feels simple on small screens while keeping property information readable.
solution: Structured the app around focused screens, clear UI hierarchy and Flutter widgets that can be reused as the project grows.
architecture: Flutter application written in Dart with screen-based navigation, reusable widgets and mobile-first layouts.

title: Job Search Telegram Bot
summary: A Python Telegram bot project for finding and organizing job search results.
description: A bot project that explores how Telegram can be used as a lightweight interface for job search automation and notifications.
challenges: Making job-search data easy to request and read inside a chat interface without overwhelming the user.
solution: Used a command-based bot flow so users can trigger searches and receive compact results directly in Telegram.
architecture: Python bot logic built around Telegram commands, simple handlers and external job-search data sources.

title: Shopzone Backend
summary: Backend work for an online shop project, connected to a React/MySQL e-commerce stack.
description: A backend-focused shop project that supports product and store workflows for a full-stack e-commerce application.
challenges: Separating backend responsibilities from the front end while keeping the data flow simple to understand and extend.
solution: Organized the backend around clear API responsibilities and a database-backed structure for shop data.
architecture: Express/Node style backend paired with MySQL data storage and a React front-end repository in the same project family.

title: Spring Boot Backend
summary: A backend project built with Spring Boot to practice REST APIs, services and clean server-side architecture.
description: This Spring Boot project focuses on building a simple backend service with structured endpoints, business logic and a clean API design.
challenges: Designing a backend that stays modular while keeping the code organized and easy to extend.
solution: Used Spring Boot with a service-oriented structure to separate controllers, business logic and data handling clearly.
architecture: Java backend built with Spring Boot, REST endpoints and a modular server-side architecture.

title: Premium Newsletter Template
summary: A polished HTML newsletter template focused on clean structure and premium visual presentation.
description: A newsletter template project for practicing HTML layout, spacing, typography and reusable marketing sections.
challenges: Creating a template that looks professional while staying lightweight and easy to customize.
solution: Used a clear section structure, strong spacing and simple HTML/CSS patterns that can be adapted for different campaigns.
architecture: Static HTML/CSS template with reusable content sections and responsive-friendly layout choices.

title: GitHub Search
summary: A JavaScript project for searching GitHub profiles and displaying results from the GitHub API.
description: GitHub Search is a small front-end app that practices API fetching, search input handling and displaying developer profile data.
challenges: Handling API responses and empty states while keeping the search experience quick and readable.
solution: Built a focused search interface that fetches GitHub data and presents the important profile details clearly.
architecture: JavaScript front end using GitHub API requests, DOM/UI updates and simple responsive styling.

title: Coffee Shop Competition
summary: A second-semester university project for a coffee shop app concept with a polished mobile UI.
description: This project was created as a second-semester competition project for a coffee shop concept, focusing on mobile layout, visual design and a simple user experience.
challenges: Designing a memorable coffee shop experience for mobile while keeping the interface clean and easy to navigate.
solution: Built a focused Flutter app experience with strong visuals, clear sections and a simple structure that highlights the coffee shop concept.
architecture: Flutter mobile app built in Dart with a structured screen-based experience for a coffee shop concept.
